---
title: "archive_consolidator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\archive_consolidator.py"
loc: 162
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.80
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 5.35
overall_score: 2.11
---

## Intent
The `archive_consolidator.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on ArchiveConsolidator, __init__, _get_complexity, _get_git_churn, _has_test_coverage, analyze, _write_ledger, _render_report, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ArchiveConsolidator, __init__, _get_complexity, _get_git_churn, _has_test_coverage, analyze, _write_ledger, _render_report, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [ast](file://ast)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [radon.complexity](file://radon.complexity)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `ArchiveConsolidator`
- `__init__`
- `_get_complexity`
- `_get_git_churn`
- `_has_test_coverage`
- `analyze`
- `_write_ledger`
- `_render_report`
- `main`
